news.headline: OMNICOMMANDER teams up with Apiture to improve digital marketing for community financial institutions.
news.summary: In Wilmington, North Carolina, a digital solutions provider called OMNICOMMANDER has recently partnered with Apiture, a top digital banking solutions provider. The collaboration between the two companies brings cutting-edge technology and expertise together, offering innovative digital solutions in the banking sector. This partnership is expected to significantly impact the industry, with OMNICOMMANDER's vast experience and Apiture's leading position in digital banking, promising enhanced services to customers.

news.headline: Banks borrow £53.4 bln in BoE short-term repo operation.
BoE Gov. Bailey: The effect of tariffs on inflation is more ambiguous.
Bitcoin's bullish trend persists as price surpasses $98,000 after recent recovery; potential for new highs imminent.
news.summary: After experiencing a recent downturn, the price of Bitcoin has bounced back to reach the $98,000 mark. Analysis indicates that the cryptocurrency may be on the verge of establishing new record highs in the near future.

news.headline: MSSA and 5GAA partners to integrate terrestrial and non-terrestrial networks, emphasizing D2D and IoT services.
news.summary: In San Ramon, California, the Mobile Satellite Services Association (MSSA) has partnered with 5GAA with the goal of integrating terrestrial and non-terrestrial networks. This collaboration will primarily concentrate on advancing Direct-to-Device (D2D) communication and Internet of Things (IoT) services.

news.headline: Panera Bread appoints Santhosh Kumar as new CIO to lead tech across 2,200 cafes, effective February 12.
news.summary: Panera Bread, a renowned brand in the fast casual dining sector, revealed the appointment of Santhosh Kumar as their new Chief Information Officer. Effective February 12, he will report to Interim CEO Paul Carbone. Kumar will be tasked with heading the technological operations of the company, overseeing technology implementation in over 2,200 Panera cafes. In his new position, Kumar will collaborate with the Panera Bread leadership team and take charge of technology development and integration to enhance the customer experience.

news.headline: Green River Distilling Co. releases Kentucky Straight Wheated Single Barrel Bourbon, 110-130 proof, expanding lineup.
news.summary: In Owensboro, Kentucky, the esteemed Green River Distilling Co. is set to increase its distribution reach and introduce new barrel-strength products. One of their latest releases is the Green River Kentucky Straight Wheated Single Barrel Bourbon, showcasing the brand's renowned smooth and robust flavors with a high proof kick. This new offering will be presented at varying high proofs, between 110 to 130 proof (55 – 65% alcohol by volume), embodying the distillery's commitment to quality and innovation.

news.headline: Eli Lilly's Q4 revenues hit $13.53B, up 45%, driven by Mounjaro and Zepbound; 2025 sales forecasted to jump over 30%.
news.summary: Eli Lilly and Co (NYSE:LLY) saw an uptick in stock trading following the release of better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings and future guidance for 2025. The U.S. pharmaceutical behemoth reported fourth-quarter revenue of $13.53 billion, marking a significant 45% increase from the previous year, nearly meeting the consensus expectation of $13.57 billion. This growth was primarily fueled by a 48% surge in volume, with a slight 4% decline due to lower realized prices. The rise in volume was propelled by strong performances from Mounjaro and Zepbound, while lower realized prices were mainly attributed to Mounjaro, somewhat offset by Zepbound and Humalog. The company observed a remarkable $3.15 billion increase in revenue from New Products, reaching $5.64 billion in Q4 2024, chiefly led by Zepbound and Mounjaro. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ralph Lauren beats expectations in Q3 fiscal 2025 holiday results and raises full-year outlook.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that approximately 25% of adults in the country are not getting enough physical activity, which amounts to around 1 in 4 people. The study also found that approximately 60% of adults do not meet the recommended guidelines for physical activity, indicating a significant portion of the population is not engaging in sufficient exercise. This data underscores the importance of promoting and encouraging physical activity in order to improve overall public health and well-being.

news.headline: BoE's Ramsden: There has been strong demand for delivery slots for gold; we can meet that demand.
BoE's Ramsden: Gold stock held at the BoE has fallen by about 2% since the end of 2024
BoE's Ramsden: It is an orderly process
BoE's Ramsden: All existing gold delivery slots are booked up.

Patrick Industries, Inc. reported Q4 net sales of $846 million, up 8% from Q4 2023. Full-year net sales reached $3.7 billion, a 7% increase. Operating margin for the year was 6.9%. Adjusted diluted EPS for 2024 was $4.34. The company declared a cash dividend of $0.40 per share. Patrick strengthened its Powersports platform, acquiring Sportech, LLC, and expanded its Outdoor Enthusiast aftermarket presence with the acquisition of RecPro. The company redeemed $300 million 7.50% Senior Notes due 2027 and issued $500 million 6.375% Senior Notes due 2032. Total debt at the end of 2024 was around $1.3 billion, with available liquidity of approximately $804 million. Business acquisitions totaled $412 million in 2024. Free cash flow for 2024 was $251 million, and $55 million was returned to shareholders in dividends and share repurchases. Operating income of $258 million decreased 1% compared to 2023, with diluted EPS at $4.11. Adjusted EBITDA for 2024 was $452 million. Cash provided by operations was $327 million, and free cash flow was $251 million. Business acquisitions totaled $412 million in 2024. Total debt at the end of 2024 was around $1.3 billion. Available liquidity was approximately $804 million. The company returned $18 million to shareholders in Q4 2024, with $55 million returned throughout the year. The company's Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.40 per share of common stock.Key details: Q4 net sales $846M, full-year net sales $3.7B, 2024 adjusted diluted EPS $4.34, declared quarterly dividend $0.40/share.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Patrick Industries reported an 8% increase in net sales to $846 million, with full-year net sales reaching $3.7 billion, a 7% increase from the previous year. The operating margin for the quarter was 4.7% and adjusted operating margin was 5.2%. Diluted earnings per share (EPS) for the quarter was $0.42 and for the full year was $4.11, with adjusted diluted EPS of $0.52 and $4.34, respectively. Adjusted EBITDA for the full year was $452 million. Patrick reinvested in its Powersports platform through acquisitions and strengthened its Outdoor Enthusiast presence with acquisitions. The company also refinanced its debt and increased its share repurchase authorization. The industry segments showed varying performances, with housing revenue increasing by 12%, RV revenue by 1%, marine revenue decreasing by 17%, and powersports revenue soaring by 228%. The company returned $55 million to shareholders in dividends and share repurchases in 2024 and had total debt of approximately $1.3 billion, with total net leverage ratio at 2.7x. Patrick Industries remains optimistic about future growth potential and is focused on strategic investments and innovation to drive shareholder value in 2025 and beyond.

news.headline: Kellanova announces Q4 2024 earnings, full results at https://investor.kellanova.com/financials/quarterly-results/default.aspx.
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Kellanova (NYSE: K) released its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024. The details can be accessed on the company's official website at https://investor.kellanova.com/financials/quarterly-results/default.aspx. Additionally, a Form 8-K report was submitted to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission and is accessible on www.sec.gov. Further information can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Gates Industrial reports Q4 2024: Net sales $829.4M, down 3.9%, full-year $3.4B, down 4.5%. Adjusted EBITDA Q4 $180.8M, FY $761.1M.
news.summary: Gates Industrial Corporation plc reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. In Q4, net sales were $829.4 million, down 3.9% from the previous year, with net income of $36.6 million. Full-year net sales were $3,408.2 million, a decline of 4.5%, with net income of $194.9 million. Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 was $180.8 million, and for the full year, it was $761.1 million. The company provided 2025 financial guidance, including core sales growth of (0.5%) to +3.5% year-over-year and adjusted EBITDA of $735 million to $795 million. The Power Transmission segment saw net sales of $520.0 million in Q4 and $2,108.1 million for the full year, while the Fluid Power segment had Q4 net sales of $309.4 million and full-year net sales of $1,300.1 million. Adjusted EBITDA margins expanded in both segments compared to the prior year. The company noted $190.9 million in cash generated from operations during Q4 and introduced 2025 financial guidance.

news.headline: Global food preservatives market set to hit $3.9B by 2028, with CAGR of 3.0%. North America leads market. Rising demand for extended shelf-life products drives growth.
news.summary: The global food preservatives market was valued at USD 3.4 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 3.9 billion by 2028, with a CAGR of 3.0%. The growth is driven by factors including rising demand for extended shelf-life products due to changing consumer lifestyles. The post-COVID-19 era has also increased demand for natural preservatives like citric acid. North America dominates the market due to strong demand for processed foods and the presence of major players like PepsiCo and Tyson Foods. Key companies in the market include Cargill, Kemin Industries, ADM, and International Flavors & Fragrances Inc.

news.headline: Ferroglobe PLC announces Q4 and full-year 2024 earnings call scheduled for February 20, 2025.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by about 4.7% in 2022, a significant increase from the 3.6% growth experienced in 2021. Additionally, the report forecasts that emerging markets and developing economies will see growth of around 6.4% this year, compared to just 5.0% in 2021. Advanced economies are also expected to experience a slight uptick in growth, reaching approximately 3.9% in 2022. However, uncertainties such as geopolitical tensions and inflation remain key challenges that could impede this projected growth. Overall, the global economic outlook for 2022 appears promising, with various regions showing positive signs of recovery.

news.headline: Australia construction industry to grow by 2.9% during 2025-2028, with output slowing from 9.1% in 2023 to 2.6% in 2024 due to residential sector weakness and material supply constraints.
news.summary: The latest report on the Australia Construction Market projects a gradual decline in the industry growth rate. The sector expanded by 9.1% in 2023; however, it is anticipated to decrease to 2.6% in 2024. This downturn is primarily attributed to the ongoing challenges faced by the residential segment, coupled with higher interest rates and constraints in material supply. The report, titled "Australia Construction Market Size, Trends, and Forecasts by Sector - Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional and Residential Market Analysis to 2028 (Q4 2024)," is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: James Campbell Company acquires Houston industrial park, with 663,882 sq. ft. and 7.4-acre land, to expand US portfolio.
news.summary: In Kapolei, Hawaii, James Campbell Company (JCC), a prominent real estate investment firm with a $5 billion valuation and a history tracing back to 1860, has completed the purchase of Beltway Crossing Northwest in Houston, Texas. This acquisition comprises three industrial buildings covering a total of 663,882 square feet and a 7.4-acre land parcel. The move aligns with JCC's approach to broaden its investment portfolio and reinforce financial security by entering thriving U.S. markets. The company aims to leverage these assets for long-term growth and stability in its operations.

news.headline: TruArc Partners sells AI Fire, a commercial fire service provider. TruArc to keep ownership stake. Acquisition in March 2021. Transaction terms undisclosed.
news.summary: A private equity firm, TruArc Partners, LP, specializing in middle-market investments, has revealed the successful sale of AI Fire, LLC, a commercial fire and life safety services company. The firm has decided to maintain part ownership of AI Fire following the sale. Specific details of the transaction were not disclosed. TruArc initially acquired AI Fire in March 2021 and has since made substantial investments to bolster the company’s management team.

news.headline: Nautilus Biotechnology will share Q4 and FY 2024 financial results on February 27, 2025.(Symbol: NASDAQ: NAUT)
news.summary: On February 6, 2025, Nautilus Biotechnology, Inc. (NASDAQ: NAUT) revealed its plans to release the financial outcomes of the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 27, 2025, prior to the market opening. Nautilus is advancing a cutting-edge single molecule protein analysis platform.

news.headline: LKQ Corp adds Sue Gove & Michael Powell to its Board of Directors.
Zscaler's second quarter FY2025 earnings call will be hosted on March 5 after market close.
news.summary: Financial results are scheduled to be disclosed on Wednesday, March 5, following the stock market's closing hours.

news.headline: LocumTenens.com has been in the healthcare industry for 30 years, known for staffing solutions.
news.summary: A prominent healthcare staffing firm, LocumTenens.com, celebrates its 30th anniversary in 2025. Known for its expertise in placing clinicians in high-demand areas, the company has been a reliable presence in the industry for three decades. Offering a range of services to address the healthcare staffing deficit, including temporary placements for physicians and advanced practice professionals, LocumTenens.com has established itself as a trusted partner.

news.headline: FuelCell's SOEC system undergoes testing at Idaho Nat'l Lab, showing commercial potential for nuclear plants.
news.summary: A testing and validation period for FuelCell Energy's solid oxide electrolysis cell (SOEC) system has started at the U.S. Department of Energy’s Idaho National Laboratory (INL) located in Danbury, Connecticut. The facility, known for its focus on nuclear research, renewable energy systems, and security solutions, is examining the system. FuelCell Energy, traded as (NASDAQ:FCEL), made the announcement on February 6, 2025, marking a significant step in advancing their technology. The SOEC system's performance and efficiency will be evaluated during this testing phase, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation in clean energy solutions.

news.headline: New home listings increased by 7.9% while homebuying demand declined; pending sales improved slightly, but down 8.1% year over year.
news.summary: In Seattle, new U.S. home listings for sale increased by 7.9% year-over-year in the four weeks ending February 2, marking the largest rise since the previous year's end. Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN) reported these findings, specifying a notable improvement in pending sales from the previous month but a decline of 8.1% compared to the same period last year. This trend is also evident in the earlier stages of the home buying process according to the report released by Redfin.

news.headline: Operation HOPE's 2024 report reveals record client numbers and improved outcomes, highlighting growth and success.
news.summary: Atlanta-based organization Operation HOPE released its top-line outcomes for 2024. The nonprofit, focused on aiding low- and moderate-income individuals in navigating the evolving economy, achieved significant success. It served a record number of clients, expanded its network of top-tier partners, and enhanced client results by boosting credit scores, bolstering savings, and reducing debt levels. Operation HOPE operates through its HOPE Inside branch.

news.headline: Enphase Energy expands support for grid services programs in Puerto Rico, Colorado, and Nova Scotia with IQ Battery 5P.
news.summary: In FREMONT, California, on Feb. 06, 2025, Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH), a renowned global energy technology firm specializing in microinverter-based solar and battery systems, disclosed plans to broaden its assistance for grid services initiatives in Puerto Rico, Colorado, and Nova Scotia, Canada. These programs, referred to as virtual power plants (VPPs), will be supported by the IQ® Battery 5P, the company's latest innovative product. Enphase Energy is recognized as the top supplier of microinverter-based solar and battery systems worldwide.

news.headline: Banks disappointed as Trump fails to deliver promises of easing regulations - expected a Republican-controlled Congress to pave way.
news.summary: Banks were optimistic that the combination of President Donald Trump's election and a Republican-held Congress would lead to a more favorable regulatory environment for them.

news.headline: SFL Missions Inc. awarded contract by CSA for HAWC satellite design study. Mission to launch in 2031 to collect atmospheric data for weather prediction.
news.summary: In Toronto, SFL Missions Inc. has secured a contract from the Canadian Space Agency (CSA) through a competitive bid to undertake a conceptual design study for the High-Altitude Aerosols, Water vapor, and Clouds (HAWC) satellite mission. HAWC, planned as Canada’s part of NASA’s Atmosphere Observing System (AOS) mission set to launch in 2031, aims to gather atmospheric data for enhancing extreme weather prediction, climate modeling, and air quality forecasting.

news.headline: Brazilian companies are utilizing AI and data tools to enhance sustainability efforts and combat climate change, according to ISG.
news.summary: In São Paulo, numerous Brazilian companies are allocating resources towards technology advancements in efforts to enhance environmental sustainability and combat the consequences of climate change, as stated by ISG.

news.headline: Barfresh secures $3 million in financing for expansion, selling common stock at $2.85/share primarily to existing shareholders.
news.summary: Barfresh Food Group Inc. reported on February 6, 2025 that they have successfully completed a financing round for common stock, raising $3 million at a rate of $2.85 per share. The funding was largely backed by current shareholders. The company, known for its frozen beverages, plans to utilize this investment to enhance its manufacturing capacity to keep up with increasing consumer needs. This initiative comes as a result of recent successes in the education sector and positive market response to the new Pop & Go™ 100% Juice Freeze Pops during the testing phase. Barfresh anticipates that this financial boost will lead to a favorable cash flow position moving forward.

news.headline: RRD upgrades GA facility with digital tech, HP print presses. Investment doubles workforce, boosts automation capabilities.
news.summary: RRD, a leading global provider of marketing, packaging, print, and supply chain solutions, is making a significant investment in cutting-edge robotic technologies and advanced digital print presses from HP for its Austell, GA facility. This move aims to elevate the facility into a state-of-the-art commercial print hub. The investment not only doubles the workforce at the site but also establishes a new standard for swift, high-capacity digital production and automation. Craig Roberton, President of Commerci, emphasized RRD's dedication to innovation in this transformation.

news.headline: Aqua Metals enhances board with Steve Henderson & Eric Gangloff to advance sustainable battery recycling.
news.summary: Steve Henderson, a prominent figure in the industry, and finance expert Eric Gangloff have joined forces to offer their strategic expertise in driving growth. Henderson, a renowned leader, and Gangloff, a seasoned finance professional, are set to collaborate and bring their wealth of experience to support the industry's expansion. The combined skill set of Henderson and Gangloff is expected to be instrumental in achieving success in the growth strategy. This partnership has drawn attention due to the impressive track record of both individuals, with Henderson known for his industry leadership and Gangloff acclaimed for his financial acumen. The collaboration of these two experts is seen as a significant move that could potentially impact the growth trajectory of the industry.

news.headline: AT&T and TransUnion introduce in-network branded call display showing company names, logos, and call reasons on most Android devices for AT&T wireless customers, no app needed.
news.summary: AT&T wireless customers using most Android devices can now view verified incoming calls from companies, including names, logos, and call reasons, without requiring an additional app. This feature enhances caller identification and transparency for customers, providing them with more information when receiving calls.

news.headline: Mary Ann’s Specialty Foods partners with QAD for production scheduling automation, enhancing efficiency.
news.summary: In Santa Barbara, California, QAD Inc., a prominent provider of cloud-based manufacturing and supply chain solutions, revealed that Mary Ann’s Specialty Foods will be integrating QAD Advanced Scheduling to streamline production scheduling operations. With over 50 years of experience, Mary Ann’s is known for their top-tier branded meats. This collaboration highlights Mary Ann’s dedication to adopting modern technologies for enhancing their processes.

news.headline: CAMP4 to join investor conferences with CEO Josh Mandel-Brehm, focusing on regRNA-targeting ASO therapies - Nasdaq: CAMP.
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on February 6, 2025, CAMP4 Therapeutics Corporation (Nasdaq: CAMP) disclosed their participation in investor conferences. CAMP4 is a clinical-stage biotech firm focusing on regRNA-targeting ASO therapies to elevate gene expression for reinstating normal protein levels. The company's President & CEO, Josh Mandel-Brehm, will represent them in the forthcoming conferences.

news.headline: GrowGeneration Corp. (NASDAQ: GRWG) provides business update in Year End Letter, highlighting accomplishments and preliminary 2024 results.
news.summary: In Denver, GrowGeneration Corp. (NASDAQ: GRWG) shared a letter with its shareholders regarding the company's achievements in 2024. As a key player in retailing and distributing specialty hydroponic and organic gardening products in the US, GrowGen's Co-Founder and CEO Darren Lampert provided updates. The company highlighted its progress for the year and offered insights into the preliminary full year 2024 results and future expectations. This communication emphasizes the company's commitment to growth and success in the industry.

news.headline: Westwater Resources backs ITC's preliminary ruling on Chinese graphite imports impeding US industry, supported by AAAMP.
news.summary: Westwater Resources, Inc., a company focused on energy technology and battery-grade natural graphite (NYSE American: WWR), has expressed backing for the recent finding by the U.S. International Trade Commission stating that China's graphite exports have significantly obstructed the growth of a graphite industry in the U.S. The American Active Anode Materials Producers (AAAMP) initiated a trade case in December 2024, prompting this development.

news.headline: Torr Metals closes final private placement tranche, raises $630,560 with 1,382,500 NFT units at $0.10 per unit.
news.summary: Torr Metals Inc. has completed the final tranche of its oversubscribed non-brokered private placement, raising a total of $630,560. The Company issued 1,382,500 non-flow-through units at $0.10 per unit, resulting in aggregate gross proceeds of $138,250. This announcement was made in Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 6, 2025, via IBN.

news.headline: Oklo board member, Chris Wright, confirmed as U.S. Secretary of Energy on February 3, 2025, steps down from the company's board.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Oklo Inc. (NYSE: OKLO) revealed today that Chris Wright, a Board of Directors member, has been appointed as the U.S. Secretary of Energy on February 3, 2025. Consequently, Wright has resigned from his position on Oklo's Board to fulfill this significant responsibility in shaping the country's energy strategies. Jacob DeWitte, Co-Founder and CEO of Oklo, expressed appreciation for Wright's service and congratulated him on his new role. The transition marks an important development for both Oklo and the U.S. Department of Energy.

news.headline: King launches Candy Crush Solitaire™ globally, merging solitaire and Candy Crush, offering players a stimulating challenge on mobile.
news.summary: An interactive entertainment company based in London, King, has introduced Candy Crush Solitaire™ globally for mobile devices. This new game breathes life into the traditional card game by merging the enjoyable solitaire gameplay with the lively and vivid universe of Candy Crush. Candy Crush Solitaire is designed to provide players with an entertaining and mentally stimulating experience, blending the well-known TriPeaks solitaire mechanics with difficult levels. This global launch is set to attract a considerable audience due to the popularity of the Candy Crush franchise, known worldwide, and the increasing demand for mobile gaming options.

news.headline: Playtika to release Q4 2024 results before market open on Feb 27, 2025 - conference call announced.
news.summary: A company based in Herzliya, Israel, Playtika Holding Corp. (NASDAQ:PLTK), disclosed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 before the U.S. markets kick off on Thursday, February 27, 2025.

news.headline: NFL experts share Super Bowl LIX predictions using Next Gen Stats; Chiefs' quick game vs tough competition highlighted.
news.summary: In New Orleans, the National Football League unveiled significant forecasts and highlighted matchups for the upcoming Super Bowl LIX during the Next Gen Stats Preview, backed by Zebra Technologies, a prominent company specializing in digitalizing and streamlining front-end tasks and serving as the Official Real-Time Location Solutions Provider for the NFL. The press conference held on February 5 can be accessed through this link. One crucial matchup highlighted is the challenge facing the Kansas City Chiefs' dynamic quick game strategy, led by quarterback Patrick Mahomes, against a formidable opponent.

news.headline: Actuate Therapeutics to attend investor conferences in February, highlighting cancer therapies. CEO Daniel Schmitt to participate.
news.summary: In Chicago and Fort Worth, Texas on February 6, 2025, Actuate Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: ACTU) disclosed its participation in investor conferences. Actuate, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, is dedicated to creating treatments for challenging cancers by targeting glycogen synthase kinase-3 beta (GSK-3β). The President & CEO, Daniel Schmitt, will be attending the conferences.

news.headline: Blue Yonder reports $1.36 billion revenue in FY24 with 14.2% SaaS revenue growth; Net revenue retention at 101.2%.
news.summary: Blue Yonder Holding, Inc. (Blue Yonder), a major player in digital supply chain transformation, unveiled its highlights for Q4 2024 and FY24 along with key industry trends for 2025. In FY24, Blue Yonder showcased its dominance with notable figures: company revenue stood at $1.36 billion, encompassing a remarkable 14.2% surge in SaaS revenue from the previous year. The net revenue retention rate reached an impressive 101.2% for the period. This demonstrated Blue Yonder's strong positioning in the market and its comprehensive capabilities in serving clients efficiently.

news.headline: Allarity Therapeutics expands phase 2 trial of stenoparib in advanced ovarian cancer to optimize dose and patient selection.
news.summary: Boston, Feb 6, 2025 — Allarity Therapeutics, Inc., a Phase 2 clinical-stage pharmaceutical company traded on NASDAQ as ALLR, is focusing on advancing stenoparib for personalized cancer treatment. The drug is a dual PARP/Wnt pathway inhibitor, and the company uses its proprietary technology, the Drug Response Predictor (DRP®), for patient selection. The plan announced involves further developing stenoparib for FDA approval in advanced ovarian cancer. The new phase 2 protocol aims to optimize the drug's dose and enhance the DRP® patient selection criteria based on ongoing trial data. The goal is to maximize stenoparib's clinical benefits.

news.headline: Culina Health named to 2025 NY Digital Health 100 by DHNY, highlighting innovation in NY startup scene.
news.summary: In New York, Culina Health has recently been recognized by the 2025 New York Digital Health 100 (DH100), which showcases the top startups in the state. This acknowledgment is a testament to the company's innovation and promise in the digital health sector. The DH100 list is curated by Digital Health New York (DHNY) in conjunction with the New York Healthcare Innovation Report 2025, an annual publication that examines investment patterns, obstacles, and prospects in the digital health industry. Culina Health's mission is centered around providing widespread access to nutrition care, highlighting their commitment to transforming healthcare services.

news.headline: Insight Enterprises reports Q4 gross profit up 1% to $439.6M, full year profit up 6% to $1.8B with record margins.
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, Insight Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ: NSIT) released its financial results for the quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter, gross profit rose by 1% year over year to $439.6 million. The gross margin also saw growth, expanding by 170 basis points to a record 21.2%. For the full year, gross profit increased by 6% to reach $1.8 billion, and the gross margin expanded by 210 basis points to achieve a record 20.3%. The Insight Core services gross also experienced significant growth.
